name: Crazy Fruit Shooter
short_description: One day you wake up and find yourself turned into a Fruitman? Face the endless waves of vegetables chasing you, grab your gun, and blast them away!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Mesozoic Dawn
short_description: Mesozoic Dawn is a multiplayer online dinosaur survival game. Starting as a vulnerable juvenile dinosaur, you must navigate the perils of the prehistoric wilderness, utilizing the core "Growth + Nesting = Evolution" system to achieve leapfrog species iteration and evolution.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: The Unrealtor
short_description: A couch co-op puzzle adventure where two players navigate a surreal house tour, solving perspective-based puzzles by matching objects across their splitscreen, and uncovering a shifting maze of impossible architecture.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Alfons World
short_description: Collect magical creatures called "Papas" in a vast world, have them engage in battles, build structures, farm, and produce industrial goods. This is a brand new open-world survival crafting game.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Crafting +15

name: Levitar 3D
short_description: A 3D gravity shooter with infinite procedurally generated levels and hints of Thrust, Gravitar and Lunar Lander.

name: Skillwood
short_description: Skillwood is a relaxing woodcutter simulator inspired by survival simulators and incremental games. Chop wood, mine stone, trade with NPCs, upgrade forests, unlock new trees or new areas and prestige to do even better next run.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Kill Per Second
short_description: Kill Per Second is a top-down shooter with minimal feature so you can concentrate on one thing. Putting your cursor on the enemies. Survive the stages to test your skill.

name: Ball Slickers
short_description: Ball Slickers is a fast paced football party game mixing third person and top down action. Slide to steal the ball, kick to score, and outplay friends in chaotic, physics driven matches.

name: Ramen Simulator
short_description: Ever dreamed of crafting the perfect bowl of ramen? In Ramen Simulator, you can unleash your creativity and build your own unique ramen style!
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Crafting +15
現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Curse:The First Knot
short_description: Some moments wish they never happened. After the accident you caused, you hide in a remote Anatolian village where secrets linger in the shadows of mosques. In this psychological horror by two developers, can you face your conscience? No escape. Only confrontation.

name: Cozy Cleaner
short_description: Cozy Cleaner is a relaxing cleaning game where you tidy and organize rooms messed up by playful cats. Pick up clutter, wipe away dirt, and bring order back to every space for a calming, refreshing experience with cozy soundtracks.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー100人以上 +8

name: Idle Chapel
short_description: A dark-fantasy incremental game about confronting a rising cult. Seek out worshipers who turned to darker gods and smite them back to the light. Harness their devotion to grow stronger and purge the land of evil - one click at a time.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー100人以上 +8

name: NONEWORLD
short_description: NONEWORLD is a cute RPG set in a dying world. You are a Princess from another world, accompanied by an omnipresent Cheshire Cat. Only you and your allies can return the Princess home safely.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: RPG +10

name: Idle Startup
short_description: Build a tech company from a one-person garage into a global empire. Train six skills, complete their upgrade trees, chase milestone bonuses, and unlock new departments in this clean, addictive incremental idle game — progress keeps rolling even while you're away.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー100人以上 +8

name: Agraria
short_description: Some days you just want to dig in the dirt and watch something grow. Agraria gets it. Build your dream farm at your own pace - tilling, planting, harvesting, and slowly building an agricultural empire - all under the caring, non-intrusive guidance of Agraria Inc. (Terms and conditions may apply.)
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: FAST FOOD FUNKIN'
short_description: Have some beats with yo' mickey dee double-cheese. A high-caloric FRIDAY NIGHT FUNKIN' parody game made for the annual Flash Forward Jam on Newgrounds

name: Blackjack: CHEAT THE HOUSE!
short_description: Blackjack: CHEAT THE HOUSE! is a blackjack deck-building roguelike where you collect, buy, and upgrade "cheats" to beat the dealer. Work your way to $1,000,000 and unlock the 6 build trophies - cheat, win, repeat!
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelike +10
現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Where Stones Sleep
short_description: A cozy, single-screen puzzle platformer focused on planning, experimentation, and clear cause-and-effect, with no combat or time pressure.

name: Punt! Rollin Raccoons
short_description: The Raccoons are out and up to no good! Punt your very own Raccoon and cause havoc in this Pinball inspired arcade game. Destroy whatever is in your path, complete missions, and customize your rotund friend.

name: Playful Pursuit
short_description: Playful Pursuit is a colorful 3D adventure platformer where you jump, climb, solve puzzles, battle goofy enemies, collect VHS tapes, and build friendships with allies in a silly High Desert quest to rescue Eddy’s stolen teddy bear.

name: AI Slop
short_description: Flood the internet with disgusting AI Slop in this anti-AI incremental sim! Create AI artists & agents to trigger mass outrage. While your slop botnets take over the world, play a Joker Poker roguelike card game or trade risky meme coins. Will you achieve the singularity or just get sued?
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelike +10

name: Trolley Time
short_description: Cute animals shopping for groceries - what chaos could possibly ensue? Play solo or with up to three friends in this bite-sized game, engaging in frantic action as you try to deliver as many groceries as possible within the time limit!

name: Immortal Cards
short_description: A Xianxia Roguelike deckbuilder. 3 cultivators, 214 cards, 42 relics, 12 formations. Master Five Elements combat across 3 acts. 9 endings, 21 difficulty levels. Every run is unique.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelike +10

name: Off Gridders
short_description: Crush the competition in this fast-paced team sport where every second counts! Slide, run, catch the ball and face off the opposing team in an abandoned arena to score maximum points in high energy matches!

name: 관상
short_description: 조선 시대 관상가로 위장해 수배자를 색출하는 추리 생존 게임. 매일 찾아오는 손님의 얼굴을 관찰하고, 수배 조건과 대조해 신고하세요. 잘못된 판단은 불이익으로, 올바른 판단은 생존으로 이어집니다. 30일 후 당신의 선택이 4가지 엔딩 중 하나를 결정합니다.

name: Upward
short_description: Try to stay alive for as long as possible, by avoiding various enemies and obstacles while collecting as many apples as your heart desires. Play against friends, unlock cool cosmetics or achieve a new highscore. The choice is up to you.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Spider Subway
short_description: Spider Subway is a game built around speedrun, challenging players to escape from a subway in the fastest possible time. The trains operate according to a timetable that players can customize themselves. Fine-tune the schedule down to one hundredth of a second and beat your best time.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: EVIDENCE
short_description: EVIDENCE is an atmospheric neo-noir detective thriller. Investigate murders, narcotics trafficking, underground casinos, disappearances, arson cases, robberies, and strange incidents that slowly begin connecting into something far bigger.

name: Pitch & Pixel
short_description: Battle through 30 years of digital agency history — optimize sales & marketing, deliver projects, grow your team and outsmart your rivals. Fully simulated market and freely chosen path to success — boutique with quality or agency group? You decide.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Oleander-X
short_description: Oleander-X is a pixel-art stealth action game about classified missions, buried evidence, and a cure that should never have existed. Infiltrate guarded facilities, gather proof, plant explosives, and escape before the truth turns against you.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2
